input.name: q
input.placeholder: Type internet slang, viral trends, or tech buzzwords...

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: <!-- High-Performance Banner Monetization Placement Slot --> <script async="async" src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-9030570768332783" crossorigin="anonymous"></script> <!-- mycolleagueapp_leaderboard-bottom_AdSense2_728x90_as --> <ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display:inline-block;width:728px;height:90px" data-ad-client="ca-pub-9030570768332783" data-ad-slot="8266860338"></ins> <script> (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}); </script>

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

body.footer: © 2026 SlangBase Inc. Built for hyper-growth scale monetization.
